sections.heading: Project Context
sections.content: rfxn Development Framework (RDF) — convention governance, agent pipelines, and project orchestration for the rfxn ecosystem (APF, BFD, LMD, Sigforge, shared libraries). All projects are Bash 4.1+ targeting CentOS 6 through modern distros.

sections.heading: Constraints & Boundaries
sections.content: Bash 4.1+ floor (CentOS 6). No ${var,,}, mapfile -d, declare -n, $EPOCHSECONDS. No global declare -A. command cp/mv/rm in source (not bare, not /usr/bin/). Double-quote all variables. Guard all cd with || exit 1.
